transcript: Speaker A: बघ ना जरा कोणाचा कॉल आहे. [Just check whose call it is.] Speaker B: Hello, yes, that works for us. No, we don't use a credit card. We prefer to manage expenses carefully and avoid unnecessary debt. Alright, thank you. Speaker A: अरे वा! किती कॉन्फिडन्स मध्ये इंग्रजी बोललीस! [Wow! You spoke English with so much confidence!] Speaker C: आई इंग्लिश एकदम सॉलिड झालीय तुझी! [Mom, your English has become really solid!] Speaker A: कसं शिकलीस हे सगळं? [How did you learn all this?] Speaker B: My Sivi App. तिकडे AI Teacher आहे. जेव्हा हवं तेव्हा मराठीतूनच इंग्लिश बोलायला शिकवतो. [My Sivi App. There is an AI Teacher there. Whenever you want, it teaches you to speak English through Marathi.] Speaker A: काय सांगतेस! आणि किती पैसे भरलेस ग? [What are you saying! And how much money did you pay?] Speaker B: कोथिंबिरीच्या पैशांपेक्षाही कमी. फक्त तीन रुपयांत काम झालं. [Less than the price of coriander. Done in just three rupees.] Speaker A: मग मी पण जॉईन करतो. [Then I will also join.] Speaker B: मग दाबा Install बटन. आत्ताच My Sivi App इन्स्टॉल करा. [Then press the Install button. Install My Sivi App right now.]
on_screen_text:
जेव्हा आई झक्कास इंग्रजी बोलते [When mom speaks awesome English]
बघ ना जरा [Just look]
कोणाचा कॉल आहे [Whose call is it]
अरे वा... किती confidence [Wow... so much confidence]
मध्ये इंग्रजी बोललीस [you spoke English in]
आई इंग्लिश एकदम [Mom, English is totally]
सॉलिड झालीय [solid now]
तुझी [yours]
कसं शिकलीस [How did you learn]
हे सगळं [all this]
My Sivi App
तिकडे [there]
AI Teacher आहे [is an AI Teacher]
जेव्हा हवं तेव्हा [whenever you want]
मराठीतूनच इंग्लिश [English through Marathi itself]
बोलायला शिकवतो [teaches to speak]
काय सांगतेस [What are you saying]
आणि किती [and how much]
पैसे भरलेस ग [money did you pay]
कोथिंबिरीच्या [coriander's]
पैशांपेक्षाही [more than money]
कमी [less]
फक्त तीन रुपयांत [in just three rupees]
काम झालं [work is done]
मग मी पण [then I also]
जॉईन करतो [will join]
मग दाबा [then press]
Install
आत्ताच My Sivi [right now My Sivi]
App Install करा [Install the App]
summary: An animated Marathi skit shows a mother impressing her family by speaking fluent English on the phone. She credits her success to the MySivi app, which teaches English through Marathi using an AI teacher for just 3 rupees. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app.
